title: helianthemum obtusifolium
intro: Helianthemum obtusifolium, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its pink to purple flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum obtusifolium include soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, with the flowers and leaves typically being used for herbal preparations.
